ui_label: Horizontal grid cell with a displaced pole grid type and 1.0 x 0.5 degree resolution.
description: Generalized spherical latitude-longitude grid with model South Pole located at geographical South Pole, and model North Pole located in Siberia in a point with geographic coodinates 60N, 90E.  Ice sheet of Antarctica is excluded from the domain, so the southernmost latitude is -79.0375
